SEARCH
Package server.dao

Class ParkDAO

java.lang.Object
server.dao.ParkDAO
public class ParkDAO extends Object
Data access object for the park table.

Follows the same conventions as ReservationDAO: each method opens a short-lived Connection from DBConnection, runs parameterized statements, and maps rows to ParkDTO. SQL exceptions are logged and surfaced as a null/empty-list return rather than being propagated, so callers signal failure through the return value.

  • Field Details

    • COLUMNS

      private static final String COLUMNS
      The columns selected by every park query, in map(java.sql.ResultSet) order.
      See Also:
      • Constant Field Values

  • Constructor Details

    • ParkDAO

      public ParkDAO()
      Creates the park DAO.

  • Method Details

    • getById

      public ParkDTO getById(int id)
      Looks up a single park by its primary key.
      Parameters:
      id - the park identifier to fetch
      Returns:
      the matching ParkDTO, or null if no row matches or the query fails

    • getByManager

      public ParkDTO getByManager(int userId)
      Looks up the park a given staff user manages (via park.manager_id).
      Parameters:
      userId - the manager's user.id
      Returns:
      the park they manage, or null if they manage none or the query fails

    • listAll

      public List<ParkDTO> listAll()
      Lists every park, alphabetically by name — used to populate the booking park dropdown.
      Returns:
      all parks (possibly empty); never null

    • updateField

      public void updateField(int parkId, ParamField field, int newValue)
      Writes a new value to a single park parameter column. Called only after a department manager approves a change request — never directly from a client request.
      Parameters:
      parkId - the park to update
      field - which parameter column to write
      newValue - the value to store

    • columnFor

      private static String columnFor(ParamField field)
      Maps a ParamField to its park column name.
      Parameters:
      field - the parameter field
      Returns:
      the matching column name

    • map

      private ParkDTO map(ResultSet rs) throws SQLException
      Maps the current ResultSet row to a ParkDTO.
      Parameters:
      rs - a result set positioned on a park row (columns in COLUMNS order)
      Returns:
      the mapped park
      Throws:
      SQLException - if a column read fails
